method: git grep -nI for each literal across all tracked files, per repo, after remediation

repos.ficct-boutique-backend-go: CLEAN (git grep exit 1) — login/seed env-driven; docs/tests/evidence scrubbed; go build/vet/test pass
repos.gotenberg: CLEAN — docker-compose uses ${ENV}, no literal defaults
repos.ficct-boutique-frontend-angular: CLEAN — login.component empty defaults; e2e specs read process.env
repos.ficct-boutique-mobile-react-native: CLEAN — LoginScreen empty defaults; e2e specs read process.env

otherSecrets.private_keys: none in any repo (.env / Railway / GitHub Secrets only)

credentialManagement.seed: cmd/seed/main.go reads SEED_*_EMAIL/PASSWORD from env; upsert rotates password; SEED_DEACTIVATE_EMAILS disables legacy accounts
credentialManagement.rotation: admin/customer/staff rotated to strong random passwords + non-local emails; legacy admin@ficct.local/cliente@ficct.local/staff@ficct.local DEACTIVATED (login returns 'user is inactive')
credentialManagement.testCreds: kept only in git-ignored docs/evidence/production-e2e/TEST_ACCOUNTS.local.md and reported to the user
